headline: A compact command center for the Royals season

latest_prospect_update.name: Blake Mitchell
latest_prospect_update.note: Most obvious remaining minor-league prospect to track; catcher development and power/patience are the main signals. Recent line: .227 / .452 / .409.

nightly_recap: The Royals beat the Detroit Tigers, KC 4, DET 3. Kyle Isbel led the night, 2-4 | 2 RBI, R in the latest Royals game. Bobby Witt Jr. supplied the loudest Royals contact at 111.8 mph.

player_of_game.name: Kyle Isbel
player_of_game.reason: 2-4 | 2 RBI, R in the latest Royals game.
